no-restricted-syntax.message: Inline queryKey arrays are forbidden. Import { qk } from '@/lib/query/keys' and use the hierarchical factory (e.g. qk.portfolios.list()). Currently 'warn' during incremental migration; will be promoted to 'error' once 153 legacy sites are converted. PLAN-0059-C C-2.
